# **First-Time Login & Setup**

1  
Start by selecting Register to create a brand new account.  
![Start by selecting Register to create a brand new account.][image1]  
2  
Begin by entering your details  
![Begin by entering your details][image2]  
3  
Enter your organization or company name f  
![Enter your organization or company name f][image3]  
4  
Choose Existing Camera if you want to link your own IP camera for seamless integration.  
![Choose Existing Camera if you want to link your own IP camera for seamless integration.][image4]  
5  
Prefer quick setup? Select Instant setup for a hassle-free demo without hardware.  
![Prefer quick setup? Select Instant setup for a hassle-free demo without hardware.][image5]  
6  
Continue after your selections to proceed with onboarding.  
![Continue after your selections to proceed with onboarding.][image6]  
7  
Click Register to finish creating your account and unlock your platform access.

You will receive a password reset Email to set up your password  
![Click Register to finish creating your account and unlock your platform access.You will receive a password reset Email to set up your password][image7]  
8  
Login once you set up your passwrod  
![Login once you set up your passwrod][image8]  
9  
Start with configuration  
![Start with configuration][image9]  
10  
To edit the account information (You will see this on every level)  
![To edit the account information (You will see this on every level)][image10]  
11  
Settings  
![Settings][image11]  
12  
View and manage user roles to control platform permissions.  
![View and manage user roles to control platform permissions.][image12]  
13  
Click *CONFIGURE NEW ROLE* to add and customize user access.  
![Click \*CONFIGURE NEW ROLE\* to add and customize user access.][image13]  
14  
Switch to Users to manage user accounts and permissions.  
![Switch to Users to manage user accounts and permissions.][image14]  
15  
Use Invite New User to bring team members on board.  
![Use Invite New User to bring team members on board.][image15]  
16  
Select the role you want them to have  
![Select the role you want them to have][image16]  
17  
Back to configuration to set up our first customer  
![Back to configuration to set up our first customer][image17]  
18  
Customer is the level you will start with, followed by site, and device  
![Customer is the level you will start with, followed by site, and device][image18]  
19  
Provide the customer name for personalized service records.  
![Provide the customer name for personalized service records.][image19]  
20  
Fill in the address information and contact details  
![Fill in the address information and contact details][image20]  
21  
Save to instantly register your new customer details.  
![Save to instantly register your new customer details.][image21]  
22  
Select the customer we created to add a site under it  
![Select the customer we created to add a site under it][image22]  
23  
![Step 23][image23]  
24  
Click Add New to create a new site  
![Click Add New to create a new site][image24]  
25  
Name your new site for clear identification and management.  
![Name your new site for clear identification and management.][image25]  
26  
Save to quickly add this site to your customer’s portfolio.  
![Save to quickly add this site to your customer’s portfolio.][image26]  
27  
Select a site to add a device under it  
![Select a site to add a device under it][image27]  
28  
![Step 28][image28]  
29  
Click Add New to register a new device for this site.  
![Click Add New to register a new device for this site.][image29]  
30  
Choose your device manufacturer  
![Choose your device manufacturer][image30]  
31  
![Step 31][image31]  
32  
Add the device details then click discover  
![Add the device details then click discover][image32]
